title: Mach 2WP15 Impact Gloves
shortDescription: Maximum dexterity & high grip performance. Back of hand impact protection. Provides optimum balance between flexibility & impact dispersion
description: Maximum dexterity & high grip performance. Back of hand impact protection. Provides optimum balance between flexibility & impact dispersion

features: Provides optimum balance between flexibility & impact dispersion
attributes.composition: Yellow TPR (Thermo Plastic Rubber) ribs to absorb the energy of a blow & redirect it along the length of the glove; Synthetic leather on the palm with raised PVC dots for added grip and life of glove; Neoprene cuff provides added wrist protection
